Errors.noAddPath: No path specified for addChange action
Errors.noDeleteArray: No changes array found at path: {path}
Errors.noDeletePath: No path specified for deleteChange action

children.hint: Children changes are applied to an actor's children and grandchildren. Regular changes should not be applied at this time.
children.label: Children

derived.hint: Some changes are created data derived from items and effects. These are applied during the derived phase to both actors and items. This applies after items have their data derived but before actors do.
derived.label: Derived
